automation_first_rule.principle: Codex labor is for building and debugging the factory, not for becoming the permanent factory worker.
automation_first_rule.new_device_setup: Read START_HERE_OPENCLAW.md, then OPERATIONS_MANUAL.md; run npm run setup:win, npm run doctor, and npm run local.

current_blockers: Sticker/public publish is blocked by live eBay cover mismatch until source repair or replacement is verified.
Printify login can expire; use npm run printify:login to verify/recover the CDP profile before UI source repair.
Etsy API app is still pending personal approval; do not publish Etsy listings or trigger listing fees until Rex confirms readiness.
Network may be unstable; run supervisor/network guard before large online batches.
Printify official/default mockups should be preserved when useful; cover repair now validates custom cover/design presence and live buyer-page result rather than requiring exactly one default image.
One verified sample proves some old inventory-managed eBay variation images may not accept source repair; use replacement listing flow for READY_TO_REPLACE_VERIFIED rows.

cover_repair_state.next_action_if_logged_in: Run one targeted source repair with py modules\factory_cover_repair_runner.py --limit 1 --post-sync-wait 120, then live audit the same SKU before scaling.
cover_repair_state.latest_single_sku_test: Sticker-Academia-0005: Printify source repair reached save/publish stage and custom cover is present in Printify, but direct live eBay buyer-page audit still matched local U4 exactly. This row is now SOURCE_REPAIR_DONE_LIVE_STILL_BAD and READY_TO_REPLACE_VERIFIED in the replacement queue.

printify_login_state.rule: Never select a Google account other than rexxu024@gmail.com; if password is required, stop for manual login.

production_design_qa_state.latest_sample: 2 Acrylic rows checked on 2026-05-06 morning; 2/2 visual and size match, ahash_distance=0. Exact SHA differed due Printify-side re-encoding.

latest_market_signal.summary: 2% Standard ads are active but not enough alone; cover/gallery mismatch and search-intent/image trust are the main immediate levers.

do_not_do_without_new_signal: Do not broad-publish more stickers while cover gate is open.
Do not use Priority/PPC ads; only Promoted Listings Standard/General fixed 2%.
Do not use suggested ad rates.
Do not touch payments, orders, buyer messages, or billing settings.
Do not publish Etsy listings or trigger Etsy listing fees until Rex confirms Etsy is ready.

image_policy.sticker: Custom cover should show the actual 4pc 6x6 sticker set when possible; gallery/detail images are allowed if description clarifies they are concept/detail references.
image_policy.poster_acrylic: Use one full production design; no die-cut/sticker-split logic. Preserve Printify official mockups/defaults as product-context images unless they create buyer confusion.
image_policy.future_rd: Premium MJ-generated scene/mockups from real production images are allowed only after QA; track as R&D, not a blocker for current production.
